PROJECTS.SUBTITLE: Renovation in Vake, Saburtalo, Mtatsminda and beyond.
PROJECTS.VAKE_DESC: High-density minimalism featuring raw concrete and linear oak millwork.
PROJECTS.MTATSMINDA_DESC: Geometric volumes with concealed HVAC and brushed steel interfaces.
PROJECTS.SABURTALO_DESC: Panoramic apartment utilizing light-refracting surfaces and basalt stone.
PROJECTS.VERA_DESC: Restoration of 19th-century masonry with integrated smart infrastructure.
PROJECTS.VILLA_DESC: Multi-level residential complex with sustainable energy systems.
PROJECTS.DETAIL_INTRO: This project represents a synthesis of architectural vision and technical precision. Every element is engineered to provide maximum efficiency while maintaining a high-end aesthetic.
PROJECTS.VAKE_TASK: Redesigning a high-rise residence in Vake to maximize natural light and privacy.
PROJECTS.VAKE_SOLUTION: Implementation of smart-glass partitions and a minimalist microcement palette.
PROJECTS.MTATSMINDA_TASK: Restoring a 19th-century facade while inserting a modern steel exoskeleton.
PROJECTS.MTATSMINDA_SOLUTION: Using reclaimed brick and custom-fabricated steel to dialogue with history.
PROJECTS.SABURTALO_TASK: Transforming a Soviet-era apartment into a fluid creative studio.
PROJECTS.SABURTALO_SOLUTION: Custom acoustic ceilings paired with polished terrazzo flooring.
PROJECTS.VERA_TASK: Preserving a Stalinka apartment while introducing modern infrastructure.
PROJECTS.VERA_SOLUTION: Triple-glazed windows and concealed hydronic heating systems.

ABOUT.TITLE: FixEntro Methodology
ABOUT.TEXT_1: We operate at the intersection of engineering and editorial design. Our team handles the entire lifecycle of luxury renovation.
ABOUT.TEXT_2: Every phase is documented. Budgets are fixed. Timelines are absolute. We eliminate the friction of construction.
ABOUT.TEXT_3: FixEntro acts as your single point of accountability from demolition to final detailing.
ABOUT.STEP_1_TEXT: Comprehensive structural analysis and laser-accurate measurements before the first tool is drawn.
ABOUT.STEP_2_TEXT: Synchronized supply chain management ensuring zero downtime through global material sourcing.
ABOUT.STEP_3_TEXT: Execution by specialized engineering teams with strict adherence to international safety codes.
ABOUT.STEP_4_TEXT: Final technical certification and aesthetic detailing for a turnkey result ready for immediate living.
ABOUT.PILLAR_1_TEXT: Every millimeter is calculated. We eliminate guesswork through precise technical auditing.
ABOUT.PILLAR_2_TEXT: We create architectural experiences with premium materials, not just finished walls.
ABOUT.PILLAR_3_TEXT: Time is the ultimate luxury. Streamlined logistics keep projects moving with absolute speed.

DASHBOARD.TITLE: Estimate Engine
DASHBOARD.OLD_FUND_HINT: * Logistics constraints and structural audit requirements.
DASHBOARD.NOTES_NOISE_HIGH: Upgrade to laminated acoustic glazing (Rw 42+), resilient perimeter seals, and decoupled gypsum wall lining.
DASHBOARD.NOTES_NOISE_STANDARD: Use dual-pane low-noise windows (Rw 36+) with acoustic tape around rough openings.
DASHBOARD.NOTES_SUN_HIGH: Add solar-control low-E glazing, external shading fins, and UV-stable thermal blackout layers.
DASHBOARD.NOTES_SUN_STANDARD: Use balanced low-E double glazing and reflective insulation behind perimeter walls.
DASHBOARD.NOTES_DEFAULT: Enable Noise Map or Sunlight Exposure to generate district-specific window and insulation upgrades.
DASHBOARD.TOTAL_DISCLAIMER: * Final cost subject to technical audit.
